content.problemStatement:
For a positive integer xxx, we define f(x)f(x)f(x) to be the number of divisors of xxx that have exactly one distinct prime factor.
For example, f(12)=3f(12) = 3f(12)=3, since its divisors that satisfy the condition are 2,3,2, 3, 2,3, and 444.

For an array BBB of length L‚â•2L \geq 2L‚â•2, we define

g(B)=(‚àëi=1LBi)‚àímax‚Å°1‚â§i<j‚â§Lf(Bi√óBj)g(B) = \left(\sum_{i=1}^L B_i \right) - \max_{1 \leq i \lt j \leq L} f(B_i \times B_j)g(B)=(i=1‚àëL‚ÄãBi‚Äã)‚àí1‚â§i<j‚â§Lmax‚Äãf(Bi‚Äã√óBj‚Äã)That is, g(B)g(B)g(B) equals the sum of BBB minus the maximum value of f(x)f(x)f(x), where xxx is obtained as the product of two elements of BBB taken from distinct indices.

You are given an array AAA containing NNN integers, and integers KKK and MMM.

You can append **at most** KKK integers to AAA, but each chosen integer should be between 111 and MMM.

Find the **maximum** possible value of g(A)g(A)g(A) after performing the appends.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of two lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains three space-separated integers NNN, MMM and KKK.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äã,A2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äã: the elements of the array.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the maximum possible value of g(A)g(A)g(A), after appending at most KKK integers between 111 and MMM to AAA.
constraints: The sum of NNN and the sum of KKK over all test cases both do not exceed 2‚ãÖ1052\cdot 10^52‚ãÖ105.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: One optimal solution is to append 555 and 666 to the array, obtaining [1,2,5,5,6][1, 2, 5, 5, 6][1,2,5,5,6].
The score of this array is 1+2+5+5+6‚àíf(30)=19‚àí3=161+2+5+5+6 - f(30) = 19 - 3 = 161+2+5+5+6‚àíf(30)=19‚àí3=16.
It can be shown that obtaining an array with higher g(A)g(A)g(A) is not possible.
Test case 222: It's optimal to append 232323 twice, giving [1,1,23,23][1, 1, 23, 23][1,1,23,23] whose ggg-value is 464646.
